help: Type a message to start. Type /help for help.
welcome_message:
Hello! I'm XYZAI, your AI coding assistant.

To get started, type a message or use these commands:
  /help  - Show help
  /model - Change model
  /lang  - Change language
  /exit  - Exit
help_message:
=== XYZAI Help ===

Commands:
  /help  - Show this help
  /model - Change AI model
  /lang  - Change language (fa/en)
  /clear - Clear conversation
  /sessions - List sessions
  /exit  - Exit

Tools:
  Read and write files
  Execute terminal commands
  Search code
  Browse the web

Tip: Use @file to reference files.
